hotel_name: Khách sạn Tala Sài Gòn (TalaSaiGon Hotel)

reviews.title: Not nice
reviews.text: Not nice

reviews.title: Where ever you go hospitality in Vietnam is non-existent. They also won’t mention that the product aren’t free until you
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Service

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I have book for 5 night there but in just first night 1 got bite by a lot of bedbug and can’t sleep at all when I inform front staff they just mention it’s a share room so bug can come anytime but I think bedbugs can’t come that easily. When I try to get refund even mention just 50% of my unused night but they refuse
reviews.response:
Hello, thank you for staying at our hotel. 
Regarding your problem, we checked the entire guest area but no bugs were found. 
Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
All night noice from washing machines. 
AC is very weak and not enough for the room

reviews.title: Toilet is not good and Charge 50k for lost tower, I didn’t take it
reviews.text: Khăn lau mặt bị mất một cái, mình ko lấy nhưng mất thì bị phạt 50k, toilet thì nấp bồn cầu trật quá trật lại, nước bị trồi lên. Chưa bao giờ mình đếm khăn khi vào ks, lần này có kinh nghiệm, phải đếm mọi thứ, chụp lại :(, thiệt là thêm việc

reviews.title: They need to train their staffs more about the return regulations and keep their facilities more clean
reviews.positives: It’s near the airport
reviews.negatives: It does not clean in the toilet and bathroom.

reviews.title: Close to airport
reviews.text: If want to be close to the airport only.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The room was clean, the staff were most helpful.
reviews.negatives: The entry door to the room is covered in a translucent tint and every time someone entered their room from the lift via the hallway, a bright light would turn on and shine straight into the room waking me each time.  Inconsiderate guests slamming their bedroom doors throughout the night.

reviews.title: Poor customer service
reviews.text:
I booked this hotel as a very last minute due to 6 hours layover between flights.

Airport shuttle was 'under maintenance' so I had to walk to the hotel at midnight (about 15mins).

Once arrived, a very helpless receptionist informed me that this is a cash only hotel and they accept Vietnamese money only.... Of course as I was flying out of the country, I had very little cash leftovers, so again, they made me search for ATM at 00.30 in the area.

Room was OK although sound proofing doesn't exists. Beds are very firm. AC was cooling but quite poorly.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Close to the airport, so ideal for quick turnarounds. Quiet and well priced. The bed is very firm - almost too firm, and I like a firm mattress. Clean with decent bedding.
reviews.negatives: The room is incredibly small (there is no room around the bed, so if you're on the inside and have to use the bathroom at night, you have to crawl over your partner).

reviews.title: Better options around
reviews.text: Located in a narrow alley with construction ongoing. Room is small, not very well designed, lacks basic amenities and is infested with mosquitoes

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staffs are very friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Basic services were missing
reviews.text: No hand wash at the washbasin, mosquitoes in the room. People were using their shoes inside so room was smelly.

reviews.title: Its okay for short trip
reviews.positives: The hotel looks good, easy to commute and the staffs are so friendly
reviews.negatives: The bed got something weird which made my back got hurt. The AC at night was not cold enough so that It was so hot.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The room we got was very different from what showed in the picture - a tiny room with a tiny window facing the stairs with no sunlight and it was right next to the receptionist so it gets noisy. When we asked the staff, he agreed to change it for us the next day. But a few moments later, he went back to tell us the manager said we could only change room when we pay extra money. Not honest business approach.

reviews.title: Good stay close to the airport. Clean and spacious
reviews.positives: Clean and spacious. So close to airport . Friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Bed was a bit uncomfortable- very hard

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: This hotel has mosquitos and it's hard for grab taxi to look for.

reviews.title: You get what you pay for, I guess...
reviews.positives: The price
reviews.negatives: The beds were hard as rock 🪨, no credit card machine. Had to pay cash. I may have missed it, but I didn't see anywhere where it said cash only.

reviews.title: Not worth money
reviews.text:
Wrong photo description attached, I see the room has balcony and large mirror door, with table and chair but it turns out no door and table at all.

Room is small in comparison with high price.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: All good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The location is quite convenient, close to the airport. Rooms are spacious and clean, which adds to the overall comfort of the stay. While the hot water was consistently available, the amenities left something to be desired, making the facilities feel a bit lacking. Toilet located close to a reception, so if you stay in shared room it makes you feel uncomfortable. However, the staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful, which really enhanced the experience despite some shortcomings in other areas.

reviews.title: Overall satisfied and happy !
reviews.positives: To be honest, I did find very impressive customer service from both the receptionists, the 2 girls, Trang and Hue. Brilliant way of handling customers. Very caring and prompt. They are very good with English. I loved the hostel stay for a single night. It is best for 1-3 nights for solo travellers. I checked out early because of early morning flight to next destination. Next time, I shall come back to the same hostel if my destiny permits me to visit hochi minh city, vietnam ! I felt like my home country India when I landed up in this city and country for first time and these 2 girls with such a good attitude and good hospitality towards customers gave me reassure of that feeling that I am at home again. In short, it was a good bet ! These 2 girls are your best recruits. Pedestal fan was given along with AC and I dint see the laundry section. The beds were comfortable and smooth.
reviews.negatives:
1. The door room for bunk beds were making noise while opening and closing. Needs maintenance. 
2. The transparent door room was covered with white film and this room door is connected to the common hall along side the reception. Now all the night travellers keep checking in and checking out.  This leads to the continuous lighting inside the hall and this lumination passes thru the transparent film covered and luminates the entire room with bunk beds.
3. Noises from the elevator and travellers talking at nights, and anyone using the toilets can be heard very clearly at nights and days.
4. The shower room door needs maintenance. The lock does not function inside the shower room door.
5. The storage area under the bunk bed needs to be cleaned very well. It was full of dust and dead cockroaches.
6. Please allow early checking for free of cost for travellers coming before 1400 hours. This will bring you more clients.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room was big and clean. Great value for money. The receptionist was not that friendly.

reviews.title: Happy with this hotel
reviews.positives: Location excellent, staff attentive and helpful

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: NA

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great hotel for a night or even a nap before your flight. Near the airport but not loud. Easy check-in and out.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: shower pressure very low, so need to take longer time to shower. Air condition also not cold enough.

reviews.title: The price is quite good for a room that is big.
reviews.positives:
It was very close to the airport but not so far from the city center (only 5 km away).
The beds were queen-size, and there were two beds in a room.
The bathroom was big. The water from the shower is not so strong when using the hot water option but generally there was an ample supply of water.
reviews.negatives: I wish the refrigerator did not turn off when the key card is removed from the activation slot so that one can still keep the water bottles cold even if one has to leave the room for the whole day.

reviews.title: Convenient location
reviews.text: Great for a night if you're staying near the airport

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The price is good

reviews.title: Vị trí thuận lợi
reviews.text: khách sạn nằm trong hẻm nhỏ nên hơi khó tìm nếu không để ý kỹ, xe 7c có thể vào đến tận nơi, xe lớn hơn như xe 16c thì không thể, sbay đối diện nên rất thuận lợi, kế khách sạn có nhiều đồ ăn ngon

reviews.title: Great airport hotel
reviews.positives: Great airport hotel, clean room, nice staff, close to airport, affordable. All one needs :)

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: For the price its everything you could reasonably expect. Linen clean. Comfortable beds. pillows bit big. Has a lift, so works for big luggage. close to the airport

reviews.title: La cama más dura de mi vida
reviews.positives: la habitación es linda, las instalaciones parecen nuevas
reviews.negatives: ES LA CAMA MÁS DURA DEL MUNDO! nunca me había acostado en una cama tan dura, parecía como si estuviera en el suelo, horrible!

reviews.title: Nice and clean but beware of...
reviews.text: Enjoyed staying at this very clean hotel, however, I nearly got cut badly but the very sharp (like a knife!) door strike plate (the metal plate that's installed on the door frame for the door lock to latch into). I checked the other room and it also had a very sharp and dangerous door plate that stuck out a bit. They really need to install it flush into the frame or file down the knife like edges. Be careful of this. Because of language problem, I could not convey this. This is a nice hotel, otherwise. It is located away from the busy noisy streets but still walkable to the airport. In fact, it is nearer to walk than to take a taxi which has to make a big circle and u-turn to get there.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Está Cerca del aeropuerto
reviews.negatives: La cama muy dura y mucho ruido de las habitaciones anexas

reviews.title: Will be back!
reviews.text: The room is small but clean and tidy. The staff are adorable. I checked in and since there was a free room, they upgraded me to one with a beautiful view. It's close to the airport and reasonably priced. Overall, it's definitely worth staying here.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Nos gustó que la ubicación es cerca del aeropuerto.
reviews.negatives: La habitación muuuuuy pequeña y llena de mosquitos.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Stayed here for one night in a 6-bed dorm. The room is right next to reception and the entrance. So it can get a little noisy other than that a decent place to stay near the airport to spend the night

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Un sitio económico y junto al aeropuerto. Cumple su función.
reviews.negatives: Habitaciones pequeñas y camas muy duras.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Just stayed because I had next flight, very convenient location if you have layover

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Es un hotel bonito y limpio, nos quedamos con mi esposa una sola noche para irnos al aeropuerto al otro día, son 10 minutos andando

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Everything is very okay, except for the poor soundproofing. You can hear people outside talking normally, and the sound of flip-flops is very clear, which affects sleep. For someone like me who has trouble sleeping and likes peace and quiet, it's definitely a significant downside.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Chambre propre
reviews.negatives: Personnel pas très accueillant, grosse différence entre le prix affiché en euros et le prix en dong, si vous mangez les 2 boîtes de pâtes dans la chambre elle vous seront facturés assez cher, c'est pas un cadeau de bienvenue !

reviews.title: Evaluation
reviews.text: I stayed for 2 days, and the surroundings were quiet and cool. It's hard to find a hotel in the city center that is both cool and quiet like this. In the afternoons when I returned to my room, I didn't even need to turn on the air conditioning to feel comfortable. The only downside is that the hotel doesn't have an iron available for guests to borrow. An iron is always useful during business trips if the hotel has one readily available.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Très bien ☺️

reviews.title: Quite good for a short stay.
reviews.text: The hotel is basically clean, however, it's a bit of a walk to find a convenience store. If you check in early, it's 50k/hour. The hotel is newly built, so it's good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Propre,neuf, bien placé pour aller à l’aéroport
reviews.negatives: La porte est en verre donc on a de la lumière toute la nuit

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Everything nice including nice receptionist!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Fait le job 
Propre et pas chère

reviews.title: Good, but can he improved
reviews.text: Clean, good facilities, the staff need to check the room before allotting. Because the cup noodles are not free and when I was in the room already a noodle packet seal was broken. Then at the time of check out they were asking that I opened a packet. But i did not.

reviews.title: Ho chi minh bof
reviews.positives: Le calme plusieurs mini supermarché et endroit pour manger
reviews.negatives: Très peu de choses a voir a ho chi minh maximum 2 jours

reviews.title: Quite new and clean
reviews.text: Clealiness is important, its clean and new. But in the morning there is contruction, around 7am already started, but to sleep peacefully is there as its not in main streer.

reviews.title: Idéal pour une nuit avant l’aéroport
reviews.positives:
Je n’ai utilisé cet établissement que pour une nuit avant de partir à l’aéroport le lendemain matin. Situé tt à côté de celui ci , 5´en taxi c’est très pratique pour si rendre de bonne heure. Restauration à proximité sans aucun problème et un grand parc pour une dernière balade. 
J’ai pris la chambre la moins cher attention sans fenêtre cela n’était pas gênant pour y passer la nuit. L’hôtel est ds une impasse au calme absolu. 
Réservation du taxi avec l’application GRAB parfait en 5´
reviews.negatives: Pas d’eau chaude à la douche mais elle n’est pas froide non plus

reviews.title: I recommend but be careful they said that water is free
reviews.text:
Not true if you drink more than 1 you will need to pay, I think they should make sure they explain this in English I could have gone to the shop next door and pay less than this…it is not fair to charge for things without telling people that it is not for free…
Otherwise it is very clean and nice room.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
L' emplacement, à côté de l'aéroport ..à pied super 15 minutes .
La laverie à l' hôtel...
Ils nous ont gardés des sacs à dos  2 jours 👍
reviews.negatives: Pas très bon en anglais ..dommage

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
This hotel is one of cleanest i have ever stayed in  and ive lived in Vietnam 8yrs.
The price was great.  400k a night.
close to the airport and shops.
The only thing is the security hall light going on on off all night.
The upper half of the door into the room is a frosted plastic or glass so the light was a bit annoying.
All round a great stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
L'hôtel est très bien placé dans une impasse au calme. Les restaurants à proximité sont bons.
Nous avons pu laisser nos bagages la journée avant de prendre notre vol de nuit.
Le personnel est très agréable.  
Nous avons très bien dormi, aucun bruit pendant la nuit.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Bad service staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
La proximité de l’aéroport : 10/15 min à pieds 
La possibilité d’arriver à toute heure 
Le fait de pouvoir étendre la durée du séjour (supplément par heure, très pratique).

reviews.title: Close to Airport Good Accommodation
reviews.text: Will stay here again

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.positives: Nähe zum Flughafen und 24h Rezeption gut
reviews.negatives: Mücken im Zimmer und laut sobald sich einer im Hotel bewegt

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text: Pleasant stay at convenient location.

reviews.title: Ganz gut
reviews.positives: Alles sauber.
reviews.negatives: Das Licht im Flur hat sich die ganze Zeit von selbst an und ausgeschaltet, was man sowohl gehört als auch gesehen hat, weil das Zimmer durch ein Fenster verbunden war.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Good for people who will arrive late or in the wee hours cos they still accept check ins during that time. 

Room has 2 beds, toiletries is available. They have bidet. You get 2 free water bottles, tea, and coffee.

Very near to the airport!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Flughafennähe und ruhige Seitenstraße
reviews.negatives: Die Matratze ist sehr hart

reviews.title: Worth trying and coming back.
reviews.text: The room is very clean, comfortable, the reception is polite, and there's a window overlooking greenery. One downside: the sound insulation is VERY POOR. At 11 PM, you can hear doors slamming outside. If you're sensitive to noise, consider this. Besides that, the location is very good, in a quiet alley, with many convenience stores nearby.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: ist gar nicht so nah am flughafen man muss trotzdem grab nehmen + kakerlake im zimmer

reviews.title: Transit/ 1Night
reviews.text: Room is spacious. Its clean. However, the toilet is clogged. Nonetheless, its value for money. Very close to the airport.

reviews.title: Für kurzen Aufenthalt ganz gut geeignet
reviews.positives:
Touristenfreies Hotel nahe Flughafen in einer ruhigen Seitenstraße. Wir hatten das Zimmer zum Entspannen gebucht, da der Zwischenaufenthalt bei unserem Rückflug recht groß war. Das Zimmer war sehr sauber, relativ groß, und ruhig. Hatte sogar Minibar. Ausstatung und Komfort können aber noch verbessert werden, waren in unserer Situation jedoch ausreichend.  
Interessante Umgebung, abseits der Hotspots, mitten im "normalen" Leben der freundlichen Vietnamesen. Freundliches, aber misstrauisches Personal. Alles in allem wir waren zufrieden.

reviews.title: It’s tidy and new
reviews.text: I will definitely stay again

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Einfaches, aber großes, modernes und sauberes Zimmer. Nettes Personal und gute Kommunikation.
Für uns war die Lage am Flughafen ideal für eine Nacht. Sicher auch für 2-3 Nächte denkbar, aber in die Stadt sind es 20-30 Minuten Fahrt.
reviews.negatives: Da es ein offenes Treppenhauses über alle Etagen gibt, ist es leider sehr hellhörig. Für eine Nacht war es aber weniger schlimm.

reviews.title: Convenience Short Stay
reviews.text: I booked this place because my flight wasn’t until late. Rather than toughing it out at the airport for hours, I stayed here instead. It was great to be able to nap, grab some food, and freshen up with a shower before heading off.

reviews.title: Perfekt für eine Nacht vor Abflug.
reviews.positives:
Neues Hotel mit moderner Ausstattung in der Nähe des Flughafens. Schöne helle Zimmer, modernes Bad.
Grab in die City ca 20 Minuten 100.000VD
reviews.negatives: Etwas hellhörig und morgens laut.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Recommended! Affordable, spacious room for 1 and clean. Also fast wifi speed and has TV with Netflix and Youtube.👌🏻

reviews.title: Sehr angenehmer Aufenthalt in modernen Zimmern und ein zuvorkommendes Personal!
reviews.positives: Das Personal war sehr zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit, immer bemüht etwaige Anliegen zu lösen, ich konnte mein Gepäck ein paar Tage dort lassen.
reviews.negatives: Die Lage ist speziell, aber gut wenn man in der Nähe des Flughafens unterkommen möchte.

reviews.title: It's good for spending time comfortably and reasonably near the airport.
reviews.text: Within a 10-minute walk from Tan Son Nhat International Airport, there are many restaurants in the surrounding area, and since it is located off a busy road into a back alley, it is quiet at night. The room facilities are simple but clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Ein tolles Zimmer mit Glasfront zum glasbalkon.
Ganz neu und schick. Sehr freundlicher Empfang .
Auch das Bad war perfekt. Unglaublich für 315K
Nur zu empfehlen!
reviews.negatives: Nix

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Just fine

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Vicino all'aeroporto, ottima posizione per chi ha il volo la mattina presto
reviews.negatives: Accettano pagamenti solo in contanti

reviews.title: It's really worth staying here, everyone.
reviews.text: Everything was great, from the staff to the room. The staff were very cute and friendly, and the room was clean and luxurious, I have to say it's cheap for the price. This hotel is located in an alley, but the way there is also very easy for everyone.

reviews.title: Ottimo
reviews.positives:
Bella camera spaziosa e luminosa situata a 15 minuti a piedi dall’aeroporto. 
Bollitore e articoli da toletta. Letto molto comodo
reviews.negatives: Purtroppo abbiamo dovuto svegliare il ragazzo la mattina alle 5 per farci aprire il cancello

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff is enthusiastic, the room is clean, basic, and affordable 🫰🏻 My only requirement is a clean and tidy place to stay. The alley can accommodate cars, and there is parking outside. Overall, it's a solid 9/10.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Pulito e silenzioso camera con tutti i servizi a 10 minuti dall'aeroporto e 30 dal centro

reviews.title: Good Location
reviews.text: Great Location close to Menas Mall

reviews.title: Prima voor 1 nacht
reviews.positives: Schone kamer en dicht bij het vliegveld
reviews.negatives: Erg harde matrassen en veel geluid. Heb de hele nacht een soort waterpomp gehoord en harde klappen ergens in het hotel

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.text:
Đặt phòng 2 đêm để đi concert encore ATVNCG, điều mình nhứo nhất alf dù về 2h30-3h sáng, staff thức mở cửa để mình vào mà vẫn niềm nở.
Facilities nhìn chung tạm ổn, nước phòng tắm có hơi yếu. View khá đẹp

reviews.title: Oké verblijf voor kleine prijs
reviews.positives: Heel dicht bij de luchthaven, goede prijs-kwaliteit verhouding. Netjes.
reviews.negatives: Je hoort alles wat er in de gang gebeurt, het licht springt daar ook altijd aan, wat je tot in de kamer ziet onder de deur. Dat maakte mij wel soms wakker ‘‘s nachts.

reviews.title: Quá ổn so với giá tiền
reviews.text: Mình ở đây chỉ để ngủ 1 đêm để sáng hôm sau bay quốc tế. Lần đầu tiên book trên Agoda, đọc reviews về khsan thấy cũng ổn ổn nhưng vẫn lo về vấn đề phòng ốc sạch hay dơ. Vì mình đã từng dùng khsan khác hơn 10 năm trời nhưng càng ngày càng dơ, tóc trên giường, bụi dưới nền, toilet bẩn, ko có dép trong phòng…nên mình bỏ. Qua Tala thì chỉ có nên còn hơi bụi 1 xíu thôi, còn nhiêu là ổn áp hết, mà giá rẻ nữa. Hôm mình ở là ***k/phòng đôi. Phòng ngay sau lễ tân, rất tiện cho mình vì hành lý khá lỉnh kỉnh. Phòng ko cách âm, khách gọi điện đến khsan hay khách về trễ bấm chuông mình đều nghe được, nhưng với giá như vậy thì ko có gì để phàn nàn. Nhân viên dễ thương. Đầu hẻm thì quá trời quán ăn, có nhà thuốc, winmart… Rất tiện. M recommend nhe. À, từ khsan qua ga T3 là tầm 5km, đi grab car cỡ 50k, mình gửi luôn 100k cho tài xế. Trên Agoda hơn 1km là đến T1 đó nha các bạn.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Dichtbij de airpot en goede prijs-kwaliteitverhoudihg

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room was clean, well-equipped, but the shower water pressure was a bit weak because I was on the 5th floor. Next time I come back, I will support you again.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hele schone kamer dichtbij het vliegveld
reviews.negatives: Kamer erg gehorig, je hoort alles van de buren.

reviews.title: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, đủ tiện nghi cơ bản, giá tốt
reviews.text: Mình đặt trên Agoda có hơn 400k/đêm, đến nơi thấy phòng rộng rãi sạch sẽ, có ban công nữa thích ghê. Thực sự quá oke so với giá. Thực ra trên này dc khuyến mãi mới có giá tốt vậy chứ mình thấy bảng giá khách sạn để ở quầy lễ tân thì giá cao hơn nha. Điểm trừ xíu là phòng cách âm k được tốt và của WC hơi kẹt, nhưng mình thấy k phải vấn đề quá lớn tại xung quanh cũng k ồn mấy. Lần tới mà cần phòng gần sân bay thì nhất định mình sẽ đặt lại

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: ベッドの横に折りたたみ式の小さな棚があったので、本やタブレット、衣服など小物を置くのに役立った。
reviews.negatives: 夜中まで部屋の出入りがあったり、真夜中なのに大きな声でドミトリーの中で電話をかける人がいて眠れなかった。タバコの臭いも部屋の中にこもっていた。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is good!

reviews.title: 空港が近くて良い
reviews.positives: 24時間受付
reviews.negatives: 先払い

reviews.title: Best airport transit hotel
reviews.text: I stayed 3 nights in this hotel. I enjoyed every minutes there, nearby to airport which is perfect for my transit flight. My room was modern and clean. I will stay next time for my transit flight. Recommend!

reviews.title: Clean and new building 👍
reviews.text: Building looks new..that's the best thing..so it's as clean as I expected..I am comfortable in my stay..specially that it was raining..I was inside all the time.

reviews.title: 夜中に空港につく場合、良い場所。ベッドは快適。

reviews.negatives:
中心街から遠いので、慣れていないとどこに行くにもタクシーが必要。
どこから入ってくるのか、蚊がいた。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 2일밤 자고 하루는 방이 없어서 다음날 다시 하루밤 잤네요. 호치민에 있는 호텔 중에 가장 깨끗하고 시설이 좋아요. 직원들도 영어를 잘하고 친절해요. 비행기로 다낭에 가서 3박하고 와야 하는데 오토바이 주차를 물어보았더니 허락해주었어요.

reviews.title: great place

reviews.negatives: الغرفة كبيرة عائلية

reviews.title: Special Thanks to the Night Receptionist.
reviews.text: I want to specially thank the night receptionist for his unconditional dedication towards service. A stupid guest urinated in the lobby area outside the toilet at around 1 AM -- I don't whether he was drunk or what. The receptionist cleaned it up though it was not part of his duty. If I were him I would have immediately called the manager/owner and told him to either throw out the guest immediately or I resign with immediate effect. The manager/owner may not even know about this incident, but if he is reading this, he should express regrets to his dedicated staff member and offer special thanks.

reviews.title: Chê
reviews.positives: Sáng trả phòng có anh nào rất nhiệt tình lịch sự dời đồ ra xe hộ mình
reviews.negatives: Chỗ ở khuất địa chỉ tùm lum không dễ tìm phòng, ok ks tụi mình lội bộ đi tìm cũng ra. Vừa đi ctac về đồ nhìu kinh nhưng phải tự mang vô không 1 câu phụ hay hỏi thăm, vô tới quầy gặp lễ tân mặt rất thái độ khinh khỉnh cơn cơn 1 câu chào hỏi nói chuyện lịch sự cũng không thấy. Khâu tuyển dụng cũng khá là quan trọng đvs 1 doanh nghiệp mà để thể loại làm không được việc kiểu đó vẫn cứ nghĩ mình có cái gì để thái độ vậy thì nên xem lại. Mình biết có chỗ bằng giá mà nhân viên dth nhiệt tình mà mình không ở là do muốn trải nghiệm chỗ mới á. Chứ đừng nghĩ khách thuê với cái giá đó thì khách nghèo không có tiền rồi thái độ vậy nha. Có tiền sửa mặt chứ nhân cách rách không sửa được đâu!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good value for money, quiet location. Would hoppilandkalle stay again

reviews.title: Thất vọng
reviews.negatives:
Mình book phòng vì khá gần sân bay, tiện đi lại nhưng cảm giác nhân viên không thân thiện lắm, mình có nhiều hành lý nhưng nhân viên để mặc mình tự xách và kéo hết từng hành lý.

Lúc nhận phòng thì máy sấy tóc trong phòng bị hư, mình hỏi thay cho mình cái khác thì nhân viên chỉ bảo không có sẵn máy sấy tóc, 1 phòng 1 cái thôi.

Phòng cách âm khá kém, sáng sớm (5h15) mình đã bị thức giấc vì tiếng ồn ở hành lang và tiếng nhân viên nói chuyện.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner here is very enthusiastic, and the receptionists are very lovely and always ready to help when I need assistance. The hotel has very reasonable prices, and the rooms are quite new and clean. This is my second time visiting here.

reviews.positives: Ksan ở gần sân bay nên dễ di chuyển, giá cả cũng tạm ổn. Phòng khá sạch sẽ nhưng hơi ít tiện nghi, phòng nhỏ so với ảnh
reviews.negatives: Hầu như nhân viên rất ít quan tâm tới khách hàng, bạn của mình đau chân phải đi nạn, mình thân con gái xách 2 vali 1 balo nặng vậy mà lúc tới ksan không ai ra đón hay xách đồ giúp, lúc về cũng vậy. Mình chỉ có ấn tượng tốt với chú dọn dẹp và sửa chữa, chú có giúp mình xách vali ra một đoạn, thái độ rất dễ mến, chứ bên phía lễ tân thì quá tệ, mình có cảm giác không được chào đón khi tới ksan

reviews.text: We need a cheap hotel close to the airport, and this exceeded all our expectations. Great room with balcony and AC, free coffee and everything was very clean. Very much recommended.

reviews.title: Convenient close to the airport and Neat
reviews.text: We had a very short stay. I was with my friend and we were quite impress with the size and neatness of the room. Elevator is also available to bring your luggage upstairs to your room. Staff are nice and helpful.

reviews.title: Worth the money.
reviews.text: Key card access, close to the airport, with an elevator — super convenient! The room was spacious, clean, and comfy. 24-hour reception and morning call service were great too!

reviews.title: Khách sạn trong hẻm, từ đường Yên Thế đi bộ vào khoảng 200m bên tay trái.

Hai bạn nữ nhân viên dễ thương. 

Ủng hộ mọi người chọn lưu trú ở khách sạn này.

reviews.negatives: Nếu khách hàng muốn nhận phòng sớm hơn thì bạn lễ tân có thể tìm một giá hợp lý như 50k chẳng hạn. Nhưng bạn ấy nêu ra mức giá là 30% trên số tiền thuê phòng. Nhưng Anh Quản lý nhiệt tình xử lý tình huống để vk ck tôi nhận phòng sớm hơn dự kiến mà không phải thêm phí.Khách sạn nên xem xét lại tình huống này

We have our layover super comfortable thanks to TalaSaigon.

reviews.title: AMAZING GOOD JOB
reviews.text: Found a great last-minute deal on Agoda. The hotel is newly built in 2025. It is located in an alley but is very quiet after a day of hustling in the bustling, crowded city. The room is beautifully designed, clean, and has all the basic amenities. The staff are enthusiastic, friendly, and hospitable. I will come back!!!

reviews.title: Great spot near the airport
reviews.text: The rooms are spotless, and cannot be faulted. I enjoyed the excellent shower, and also made use of the smart TV, to connect to my Youtube account while I was there. The hotel is located in a quiet street, and within an easy 30 minutes walk to the airport. Alternatively, walk barely 15 minutes to the new Menas Mall, from whence shuttle buses run, saving you a 15 minute walk over the busy airport feeder roads.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Convenient location near the airport. There are many convenient services around. The staff is very friendly and eager to assist with any issues. The room is clean, airy, and fully equipped. I requested room cleaning every day and was very satisfied with the service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Gần sân bay

reviews.title: A cost-effective accommodation!
reviews.text: It takes 5 minutes by taxi from the airport. There is a local pho restaurant right in front and a pharmacy and GS25 convenience store nearby, which was great. The inside of the accommodation was clean and had everything you could want, including two bottles of mineral water in the fridge, a coffee pot, a clean shower, a large bed, and a TV! I especially recommend it for those on a layover or stopover! There were about three mosquitoes, but what can you do? I swatted them and slept well, haha. The next day, I came out to check out around 5 AM, and when I rang the bell, a staff member came out immediately to assist me. They were friendly, and everything was great!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Ничего не понравилось
reviews.negatives: Не принимают карты мастер кард и юнион пэй, обмена валюты тоже нет, доллары США и евро не принимают, поэтому посреди ночи нас с семьёй выгнали из отеля за неуплату со словами "сорри".

reviews.title: Calm, kind, cute staff.
reviews.text: The hotel is very quiet but close to the airport area. It is easy to access the airport and utility services. However, it has a level of tranquility that other surrounding hotels cannot offer. The staff is very enthusiastic and charming.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Было шумно не смог спать, чистый отель но комнате плесень сненах, старый мебель, персонал с приездом у меня допалнительный плату взял, по ближе аэрапорту, чай, вода комнате было, мыло мойка есть, поидет ночевать

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I was very satisfied with my stay at this hotel. The room was clean, well-equipped, and cleaned daily. The staff were friendly and helpful from check-in to check-out. The hotel’s location is very convenient—close to the city center and easily accessible to tourist attractions. Most importantly, the price was very reasonable for the quality of service. I will definitely come back and recommend this place to my friends and family!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Расположение
reviews.negatives: Грязно и без окон . Душа нет , Лейка висит над унитазом и та сломана

reviews.title: Awesome for the price
reviews.text: Close to the airport, yet in an lively neighborhood. Clean. As advertised.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Комната ,постель чистые, но ночью соседи купили и громко говорил посреди ночи, пришлось позвать мне персонал отеля и поругать соседей и плотно закрыть выход на общую террассу.
reviews.negatives: Все понравилось

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good service, very cheap room rates in Saigon, close to the airport, so it's very comfortable and quiet.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Чисто и уютно, были шампуни,зубные щетки, мыло, туалетная бумага, чай/кофе и вода, чайник исправный, чистые полотенца и постельное белье, кондиционер работает отлично, никаких поломок нет в номере, персонал приветливый и дружелюбный.
reviews.negatives: Никакой шумо изоляции нет, слышно абсолютно всё, стройка рядом и нигде не указано об этом, стучат с 2ночи - 7 утра, кто-то одну из ночей спал на лестничной площадке и храпел очень громко. Если собираетесь здесь ночевать лучше купить очень хорошие беруши, но не факт, что помогут

reviews.title: Very good.
reviews.text: The stay was excellent in terms of the price and the location being close to the airport, and the service quality, room conditions, and staff were outstanding. I am quite picky when it comes to services, but I felt this place was nearly perfect, with the only issue being that my toilet wouldn’t flush. However, since I was only there for 5 hours, it wasn’t too important. If I called the front desk, I’m sure they would assist me enthusiastically.

reviews.title: Даже на 1 ночь впечатления остались негативными
reviews.positives: Близкое расположение к аэропорту и чистота в номере
reviews.negatives:
Нас заселили в другой номер на последнем 5 этаже, не тот, что мы бронировали, потому что других на тот момент не осталось. 
Матрасы были супер жесткие , рядом с отелем стройка и утром вы будете слышать все эти прекрасные звуки, а также проезжающих мимо мопедов (не верьте, что отель тихий). Так как номер был на последнем этаже, всю ночь каждые 20-30 сек мы слышали громкую работу насоса, который администратор отказался выключать. Спали в берушах и наверно смогли уснуть только потому , что были уставшие с долгого полета.

reviews.title: Comfortable and Spacious Stay Near the Airport
reviews.text:
TalaSaigon Hotel served as a convenient stopover before our flight. We booked it for just a few hours since we wanted to stay near the airport while waiting for the check-in counters to open around 9:30 in the evening. Given its affordable rate, we didn’t expect much, but were pleasantly surprised.

The room was spacious, with a large restroom and shower area. It came fully equipped with complete toiletries. The comfortable environment allowed us to rest well and freshen up before our flight.

Overall, TalaSaigon Hotel is a great budget-friendly option for travelers needing a comfortable place to relax near the airport for a short stay.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Чисто, рядом с аэропортом
reviews.negatives:
Мы остались на одну ночь что бы отдохнуть после перелета, нам надо было очень рано вставать, шумоизоляции нет вообще, на первом этаже очень громко сидела компания и нам не удалось уснуть, лифт не работал
Не рекомендую

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I highly recommended this place

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Дошли от аэропорта пешком в принципе без проблем, по карте букинга все четко. В целом номер на 1 ночь нормальный. По дороге есть магазин, можно купить что-то на перекус ( мы приехали ночью, кафе закрыты).
reviews.negatives: Бесплатные пакетики чая и платный чайник (заявлен в прейскуранте), может опечатка, мы не перепроверяли)) Снимали около 30 номеров в разных странах, такое впервые. Вода в душе холодная, ждали долго, не дождались. Цена превышает качество, но в целом на 1 ночь терпимо

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Phòng rất sạch sẽ, nằm trong một con hẻm yên tĩnh, rất gần sân bay. 
Giá rất tốt

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Отличное расположение, хороший номер
reviews.negatives: Так как нет шумоизоляции, то в номере слышно все, что происходит за дверью

reviews.title: The perfect place to stay temporarily next to the airport.
reviews.text: I stayed for about 3 hours to catch a night flight, and it was really clean, the view from the window was nice, and it felt safe and pleasant. I stayed on the 4th floor, but the cigarette smoke from the upper floors was a bit annoying. However, the location, cleanliness, and friendliness of the staff were all good. It's the best place to shower and relax before heading to the airport. If you take a Grab, you can reach the airport in less than 10 minutes.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Не плохой отель , цена -качество очень даже схожи.
reviews.negatives: Расположение , долго искали в первый раз. А далее уже было удобно понимать где мы и где отель.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is very clean and the linens smells so great too!!! Will surely book again on my next visit or transit in SGN.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Чисто, рядом с аэропортом, все есть.
reviews.negatives: Шумный номер попался. Стуки, шум водопроводных труб.

reviews.title: Solo Travel
reviews.text: Its my first time in Vietnam and Im so tired from long haul flight. They accomodate my check in time and waited for me to arrived which I really appreciate. I arrived around 3AM. They told me due to late arrival most of the restau or shop are closed yet they provided free food for me. I make sure to come back!!!!

reviews.title: Хороший вариант на одну ночь
reviews.positives: Расположение, тишина

reviews.title: Phòng 2 giường có cửa sổ
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, thoáng mát, rộng rãi. Nhân viên rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Dịch vụ và phòng ốc như khách sạn 4 sao nhé 😍

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Брали номер для ожидания рейса. Как я понял, персонал дает номер без окна, т.к. понимает, что мы все равно на одну ночь. Номер чистый, а самое главное тихо, душ тропический, горячая вода стабильная. Рекомендую для уставших.

reviews.title: So good
reviews.text: So good

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Самое главное, это чистота . Чистая постель, рядом с аэропортом, много кафешек рядом
reviews.negatives: Такого нет

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean and beautiful room, enthusiastic staff. I will choose it for next time.

reviews.title: В целом понравилось
reviews.positives:
Рядом с аэропортом! Буквально в 1,5 км 
Чисто , новые полотенца, новое постельное белье. Сантехника в хорошем состоянии, внимательный персонал. Рядом есть кафе где покушать
reviews.negatives: Не было окна. Но так как я на одну ночь , это идеальный вариант . Вернее окно было , но оно выходило на лестничную  площадку . Но не все номера такие . То , что я на одну ночь, скорей всего поэтому дали такой номер .

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, in a good location convenient for transportation, and you should book here for April 30th - May 1st because the prices are quite cheap.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Чисто, все новое, удобная кровать
reviews.negatives: Не сразу нашел отель

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: the room is clean, located near the airport, a place to take a break and rest.

reviews.title: Достойно за эту цену.
reviews.positives:
Очень  чисто. Всё  есть. Вот только свет включается  от датчика  каждые 2 минуты. С таким  же режимом какой-то насос.  
Двери со стеклом в номер. Свет всю ночь в глаза.
В остальном очень  хорошо.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This hotel is affordable, the rooms are clean and beautiful, and they are very cozy. The staff has a great attitude, friendly and warm, making people feel comfortable. The location of the hotel is very convenient, close to the city center, with many restaurants and shops nearby. Overall, the stay was very satisfying, and I will definitely come back next time!

reviews.title: Чистый небольшой отель, персонал вежливый, идеально для остановки между рейсами
reviews.positives: Хорошее месторасположение у аэропорта
reviews.negatives: Платная вода, о которой не предупредили

reviews.title: Great Place
reviews.text: I had a wonderful stay here. Quiet, close to the airport and a supermarket, and a clean room as well. I had no complaints with my 1 night stay here before my flight the next day.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Все было супер, чисто, убрано, персонал веселый.
reviews.negatives: Автоматическое включение света в коридоре(датчик движений) который мешает спать

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: phòng đẹp , thuận tiện ra sân bay tiết kiệm thời gian .

reviews.title: Чисто это главное
reviews.positives: Чисто возде аэропорта

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room here is clean, located near the airport, and the space is quite quiet.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Жили одну ночь. Относительно чисто.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The newly renovated hotel looks very beautiful and luxurious, with good service and reasonably priced, located in the city center near the airport, which is very convenient.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Меня заселили глубокой ночью , спасибо большое девушке на ресепшн.
Очень качественное постельное бельё.
Достаточно просторная комната на 4 человека, было где переодеться и разместить вещи.
Работал кондиционер и было очень прохладно в комнате 👍
Был зубной набор, тапочки и хорошее полотенце 
Очень удобно расположение рядом с аэропортом!
reviews.negatives: Всё отлично!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Bon rapport qualité prix, proche de l'aéroport

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Очень чисто , все белоснежное , приятное  пастельное белье , отличный душ , все необходимое есть , близко от аэропорта , такси не нужно , пешком можно дойти , отличное место чтобы переночевать между перелетами👍
reviews.negatives: Было окно только внутрь здания на лестницу , открыть его нельзя .Если нужен свежий воздух , и выключить кондиционер , то не получится ) но видела что есть у них другая комната  подороже с окном . На одну ночь не критично :)

reviews.title: Everything was perfect excepted to contact them
reviews.text: Nice room and very clean for the price. Bed not comfy but for one night it's OK. But I'm not satisfied because we can't reach them! Phone, email or from Agoda platform they don't reply. I forgot my airpods in the room, try to contact them by email, Agoda chat or phone. Nobody reply!

reviews.title: Бронировали два номера, чтобы переждать пересадку на следующий самолет. Сам отель далековато от аэропорта, но отель пред
reviews.positives: Хорошо оборудованные номера, приятный дизайн.
reviews.negatives:
Полностью прозрачные душевая и туалет, все видно находящимся в комнате людям)
Если едете не парой, а, например, друзьями или родственниками - это может быть некомфортно

reviews.title: Petit hotel moderne et propre
reviews.text: Petit hôtel moderne et propre, quartier résidentiel donc calme. Prestations correctes

reviews.title: Рекомендую, отлично подойдет для ожидания рейса, обязательно остановимся здесь в следующий раз!
reviews.positives: Все очень чисто, в хорошем состоянии. Есть все удобства. Приветливый персонал. От аэропорта минут 10 пешком. Рядом много супермаркетов.

reviews.title: Une nuit de transit
reviews.text:
Juste une nuit de transit … la chambre est confortable et bien équipée . 
Très proche de l’aéroport.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: отличное расположение, отель находится у аэропорта и на тихой улице, постороннего шума в номере нет вообще. быстрое заселение, чистая комната и ванная, есть много полотенец и гигиенический набор. в целом, есть все необходимое!

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.text: Très bien pour passer une nuit avant un avion, propre et grands lits (mais très durs) et pas de navette aéroport comme indiqué sur Agoda. Nous recommandons tout de même :)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Приятный отель на тихой улочке, недалеко от аэропорта. Лифт есть. В номерах чисто и аккуратно. Рядом много мест где можно поесть и купить продукты.

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.text: Très bel endroit.  C'est neuf et assez joli et confortable.  J'ai eu la chambre au 5ieme (rooftop) c'était magnifique,  privée. C'est près de plusieurs petits restaurants locaux et petits cafés.  Il y a aussi 2-3 épiceries tout près.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Nära till flygplatsen, perfekt om du ska flyga tidigt eller något. 
Sköna sängar, fräscht

reviews.title: 1 nuit à Hoi chi minh
reviews.text: Parfait

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Miłe miejsce na krótki pobyt. Blisko lotnisko, przystanki autobusowe. Całodobowa recepcja i miła obsługa.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: mọi thứ đều ổn. Phòng sạch sẽ và giường êm hơn mong đơi. Sẽ giới thiệu bạn bè.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Niema oznaczenia hotelu jako tako , idąc główną ulicą szczególnie nocą tak jak akurat nam się przydarzyło możesz sobie szukać tego miejsca do woli , wprawdzie napis ,szyld jest na pewnej ścianie ale nie jest podświetlony i aby go zauważyć trzeba by było przestudiować całą uliczkę .W nocy ten hotel zabezpieczony jest bramą , krata , trzeba dzwonić na buzer by ktoś cie wpuścił do środka 
Dla kogoś kto jest pierwszy raz w tym mieście jest to bardzo trudno znaleść , lokalsi pomogli bo w innym przypadku o pierwszej w nocy spalibyśmy na ławce w parku ….

reviews.title: Perfect Airport Hotel
reviews.text:
I was just staying here with my dad for a couple of hours waiting for our flight but it was actually such a nice and well-kept place for a low price that I will consider coming back there. Never heard a single jet starting or landing.
Only negative point was the toilet that made a loud hissing sound after flushing but I'm sure this is already being repaired... 9/10

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hotel znajduje się tuż przy lotnisku, 5 minut samochodem. Byliśmy w wielu hotelach i płaciliśmy znacznie większe pieniądze a tutaj pomimo niskiej ceny pokój był czysty, zgodny z opisem i przytulny, miłe się zaskoczyliśmy. Zdjęcia oddają rzeczywistość. Personel również miły.

reviews.title: Zimmer 502
reviews.text: Top Zimmer, alles  neu, sauber, leider nervt die Wasserpumpe mit Geräuschen. Personal Top

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Kousek od letiste pesky 20 min.
